message:
refactor(session-index): replace recursive walk_sessions with iterative stack and symlink-safe traversal

The recursive walk_sessions() implementation had two issues:
1. Deep directory trees could exhaust the call stack
2. Symlinked directories were followed without cycle detection,
   potentially causing infinite traversal loops

Replace with an explicit stack-based iterative traversal that:
- Uses a Vec<PathBuf> work stack instead of recursive calls
- Queries entry.file_type() once per entry (avoids redundant stat calls)
- Follows symlinks to files (allowing symlinked session files to be
  discovered) but skips symlinked directories entirely, preventing
  cycles without needing a visited-set
- Gracefully skips entries where file_type() fails (permission errors)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
